title: Tensor Products: Building Multi-Qubit Systems
description: Learn how tensor products combine quantum systems, enabling the mathematical description of multi-qubit states and the exponential growth of quantum state spaces.
learningObjectives: Define the tensor product of vectors and matrices
Calculate tensor products of quantum states
Understand the exponential growth of Hilbert space dimension
Distinguish between separable and entangled states
Apply tensor products to multi-qubit quantum systems
